Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Attendance At A Deposition And Pltf'S Responses To Deft'S Discovery Requests;
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GWENDOLYN PHILLIPS, CHRISTOPHER BURRY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Christina Wallace's Attendance At A Deposition And Plaintiff's Responses To Defendants' Discovery Requests, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The first day this motion could have been heard is April 12, 2010. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
